title: Transformer Block Components
content:
# Interview Prep: Block Components

## Q1: Why does Pre-LN enable stable deep model training without requiring linear learning-rate warmups?

### Standard Answer
In Post-LN, the gradient of the residual connection is scaled by the LayerNorm derivative. As layer depth increases, the scale of gradients in early layers diminishes. Pre-LN maintains a direct identity path from input to output, keeping gradients stable.
